member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1
member.summary: Main class for building and searching a BM25 full-text search index. Provides high-performance scoring of documents by relevance to queries.
member.typeparam: The type of documents to index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Func{`0,System.String},ElBruno.BM25.ITokenizer,ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Bm25Index class.
member.param: The collection of documents to index.
A function that extracts searchable content from each document.
The tokenizer to use (defaults to SimpleTokenizer if null).
BM25 parameters (defaults to Bm25Parameters.Default if null).
Whether to treat text as case-insensitive (default: true).
member.exception: Thrown when documents or contentSelector is null.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.Parameters
member.summary: Gets the current BM25 parameters.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.DocumentCount
member.summary: Gets the number of documents in the index.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.TermCount
member.summary: Gets the number of unique terms in the index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.AddDocument(`0)
member.summary: Adds a new document to the index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.RemoveDocument(`0)
member.summary: Removes a document from the index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.Reindex(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Reindexes the entire collection, replacing all existing data.
member.param: The new collection of documents to index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.Search(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches the index for documents matching the query.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10).
member.returns: A list of (document, score) tuples sorted by score descending.
member.exception: Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.SearchBatch(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches the index for multiple queries in batch.
member.param: A collection of search query strings.
Maximum number of results per query (default: 10).
member.exception: Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.SaveIndex(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the index to disk in JSON format with optional compression.
member.param: The file path where the index will be saved.
member.exception: Thrown if the file cannot be written.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.LoadIndex(System.String)
member.summary: Loads an index from disk.
member.param: The file path to load the index from.
member.returns: A new Bm25Index instance loaded from the file.
member.exception: Thrown if the file cannot be read.
Thrown if the file format is invalid.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.ExplainScore(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Explains the BM25 score for a document and query, showing component contributions. Useful for debugging and understanding why a document scored high.
member.returns: A dictionary showing score breakdown (BM25 score, term scores, length norm, etc.).

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.ExplainScoreDetailed(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Provides detailed breakdown of why a document scored a certain way for a BM25 query. Returns a ScoreExplanation object with per-term analysis.
member.returns: A ScoreExplanation object containing detailed score breakdown.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.GetTerms
member.summary: Gets all unique terms in the index.
member.returns: A list of all indexed terms.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.GetTermDocuments(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all documents that contain a specific term.
member.returns: A list of documents containing the term, or empty list if term not found.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.GetDocumentLength(`0)
member.summary: Gets the token length of an indexed document.
member.param: The document to get the length for.
member.returns: The number of tokens in the document, or 0 if not indexed.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index`1.GetStatistics
member.summary: Gets statistical information about the index.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters
member.summary: Configuration parameters for the BM25 algorithm.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.K1
member.summary: Gets or sets k1: Controls term frequency saturation point. Higher k1 = more impact from term frequency. Default: 1.5

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.B
member.summary: Gets or sets b: Controls how much document length normalizes scoring. b=0: No length normalization b=1: Full length normalization Default: 0.75

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.Delta
member.summary: Gets or sets delta: Smoothing parameter. Prevents zero scores on sparse terms. Default: 0.5

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.AvgDocLength
member.summary: Gets the average document length in the corpus (auto-calculated during indexing).

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.Default
member.summary: Gets the default BM25 parameters (k1=1.5, b=0.75, delta=0.5).

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.Aggressive
member.summary: Gets aggressive BM25 parameters (k1=2.0, b=1.0, delta=0.5). Use for large corpora with many long documents.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.Conservative
member.summary: Gets conservative BM25 parameters (k1=1.0, b=0.5, delta=0.5). Use for small corpora with consistent document length.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters.SetAvgDocLength(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the average document length (called internally during indexing).

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1
member.summary: Optimizes BM25 parameters for a given index using validation queries. Provides grid search and automatic tuning capabilities.
member.typeparam: The type of documents in the index.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.#ctor(ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Index{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Bm25Tuner class.
member.param: The BM25 index to tune parameters for.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.TuneAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Automatically tunes BM25 parameters using a validation set of queries and relevant documents. Performs grid search over K1 and B parameter space, optimizing for the specified metric.
member.param: List of (query, relevant_documents) tuples for tuning validation.
The metric to optimize for (default: Recall).
member.returns: The optimized Bm25Parameters that achieved the best metric on the validation set.
member.exception: Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.GridSearchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs grid search over a parameter space of K1 and B values. Tests combinations of K1 from 0.5 to 2.5 and B from 0 to 1.0.
member.param: List of (query, relevant_documents) tuples for evaluation.
member.returns: A list of ParameterTuneResult objects showing metric values for each parameter combination.
member.exception: Thrown when the operation is cancelled.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.CalculateRecall(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculates recall on the validation set for given parameters. Recall = (relevant docs retrieved) / (total relevant docs)

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.CalculatePrecision(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculates precision on the validation set for given parameters. Precision = (relevant docs retrieved) / (total docs retrieved)

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.CalculateF1(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculates F1 score on the validation set for given parameters. F1 = 2 * (Precision * Recall) / (Precision + Recall)

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Tuner`1.CalculateNDCG(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{`0}}},ElBruno.BM25.Bm25Parameters,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calculates Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) on the validation set. NDCG measures ranking quality, giving higher weight to relevant documents at higher ranks.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.ITokenizer
member.summary: Pluggable tokenization strategy for BM25 indexing and search.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.ITokenizer.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes text into a list of terms.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.ITokenizer.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a single term (e.g., lowercase, stemming).

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ITokenizer.Name
member.summary: Gets the name or variant of this tokenizer (e.g., "English", "Simple").

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation
member.summary: Provides detailed breakdown of why a document scored a certain way for a BM25 query. Useful for debugging and understanding relevance scoring.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.TotalScore
member.summary: Gets or sets the total BM25 score for the document and query.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.TermIDFs
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of IDF (Inverse Document Frequency) values per query term. IDF measures how rare a term is across the corpus.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.TermFrequencies
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of TF (Term Frequency) values per query term in the document. TF measures how often a term appears in the document.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.LengthNormalization
member.summary: Gets or sets the length normalization factor applied to the document. Compensates for documents of varying lengths.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.TermScores
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of individual BM25 scores per query term. The sum of these scores equals TotalScore.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.MatchedTermCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of unique query terms found in the document.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.DocumentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the document length (token count).

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.AverageDocumentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the average document length in the corpus.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.K1Parameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the K1 parameter used in BM25 calculation.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ScoreExplanation.BParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the B parameter used in BM25 calculation.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1
member.summary: Represents a search result from a BM25 query.
member.typeparam: The type of document being searched.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1.Document
member.summary: Gets or sets the matched document.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1.Score
member.summary: Gets or sets the BM25 score for this result (unbounded, typically 0-20 for short queries). Higher scores indicate stronger relevance.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1.Rank
member.summary: Gets or sets the rank (position) of this result in the result set (1-based).

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1.MatchedTerms
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of query terms that matched in this document.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.SearchResult`1.TermScores
member.summary: Gets or sets the per-term score breakdown showing contribution of each query term. Key: term, Value: term's contribution to overall score.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.CustomTokenizer
member.summary: Custom tokenizer that allows user-defined tokenization logic.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.CustomTokenizer.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this tokenizer.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.CustomTokenizer.#ctor(System.Func{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CustomTokenizer class.
member.param: A function that tokenizes text into a list of terms.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.CustomTokenizer.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes text using the custom tokenization function.
member.returns: A list of terms from the custom tokenizer.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.CustomTokenizer.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a term (delegates to custom function for normalization). Default: returns term as-is. Override by providing custom normalization in tokenizer function.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.EnglishTokenizer
member.summary: English-aware tokenizer with Porter stemming. Applies stemming to normalize morphological variants (e.g., "authentication", "authenticate", "authenticating").

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.EnglishTokenizer.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this tokenizer.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.EnglishTokenizer.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes English text with stemming.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.EnglishTokenizer.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a term by lowercasing and applying Porter stemming.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.SimpleTokenizer
member.summary: Simple whitespace-based tokenizer with lowercase normalization. No stemming or advanced processing.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.SimpleTokenizer.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this tokenizer.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.SimpleTokenizer.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes text by splitting on whitespace and removing punctuation.

member.name: M:ElBruno.BM25.Tokenizers.SimpleTokenizer.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a term to lowercase.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric
member.summary: Enum specifying the metric used to evaluate BM25 parameter tuning.

member.name: F:ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric.Precision
member.summary: Precision: What fraction of retrieved documents are relevant.

member.name: F:ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric.Recall
member.summary: Recall: What fraction of relevant documents are retrieved.

member.name: F:ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric.F1
member.summary: F1 Score: Harmonic mean of precision and recall.

member.name: F:ElBruno.BM25.TuningMetric.NDCG
member.summary: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain: Measures ranking quality.

member.name: T:ElBruno.BM25.ParameterTuneResult
member.summary: Result of a single parameter tuning attempt. Contains the parameters tested and the metric value achieved.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ParameterTuneResult.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the BM25 parameters used in this tuning attempt.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ParameterTuneResult.Metric
member.summary: Gets or sets the metric value achieved with these parameters. The metric type is determined by the tuning process.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ParameterTuneResult.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp when this tuning was performed.

member.name: P:ElBruno.BM25.ParameterTuneResult.Notes
member.summary: Gets or sets notes about this tuning result.
